name: Double Layer Pumpkin Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 packages vanilla pudding mix and flavoring
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl with a wire whisk, combine the cream cheese, milk, and sugar until smooth.
2. Gently stir in the Cool Whip Lite.
3. Spread evenly on the bottom of the prepared crust.
4. Pour 1 cup milk into a separate bowl. Add the pudding mix and beat until well blended.
5. Stir in the pumpkin puree and spices with a wire whisk; mix well.
6. Spread over the cream cheese layer.
7. Refrigerate for at least 3 hours before serving.
8. Garnish with additional whipped topping and nuts, if desired.
